day=1; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Working on laptop with laptop on Right; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=fast; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=perception; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes working on a laptop or tablet on the user's right AND affective state is neutral AND food condition is any food, THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve visibility toward the right-side workspace.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF user has no trunk control and cannot lean forward AND affective state is any AND food condition is any, THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE outside-mouth transfer would require forward reach that is incompatible with the user's physical abilities.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer mode is inside mouth transfer AND affective state is any AND food condition is any, THEN not applicable BECAUSE the user requires inside-mouth transfer due to inability to lean forward.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND affective state is neutral AND dining context includes working on a laptop or tablet, THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user explicitly avoided dipping in a work-oriented context, consistent with minimizing mess and interruption.
